verses.text: Sanggamte aw, note kiangah ka hong hilh, note in hong sangin kiptakin na let uh thu, na phawkkik ding uh ka deih hi
Kei' hong hilh thu pen lungdamna thu ahi hi. Note in kiptakin tua lungdamna thu na let nak uh leh hotkhiatna a ngah na hi uh hi. Tua hi kei leh na upna uh a mawkna ahi hi
Kei tungah a hong kihilh a thupi pen note tungah ka hong gensawn a, tua in: Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelh mah bangin eite' mawhna tangdingin Khrih hong si-in
kivui a, Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelh mah bangin a ni thum ni-in Pasian in hingkiksak hi
Tua ciangin Peter kiangah kilang a, a zomah sawltak sawmlenihte kiangah kilang hi
Tua ciangin thu um mi za nga val tungah thakhatin kilang hi. Tua mi za nga valte, pawlkhat a sih khit tei hangin a tamzaw nungta lai uh hi
Tua ciangin James tungah kilang a, tua banah sawltak sawmlenihte tungah kilang leuleu hi
A tawpna penah, kei pen a ngeina bangin a suaklo naungek tawh a kibang hinapi-in kei tungah zong hong kilang hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh kei pen Pasian' pawlpi a bawlsia mipa ka hih manin sawltak cih dingin zong a kilawmlo zah dongin sawltakte lakah a neupen ka hi hi

Tua bang hita se leh Pasian' hehpihna tawh tu-a ciangah ka om a, kei tungah a hong piak ama hehpihna a mawkna suaklo hi. Sawltak dangte khempeuh sangin na nakpi takin ka sem zawsop hi. Tua ka sepzawhna pen keima hatna hang hiloin Pasian' hong hehpihna hang ahi hi
Tua ahih ciangin kei ka hi a, sawltak dangte in ahi zongin hong hilh thu pen Khrih' thawhkikna thu mah hi a, note' up zong tua thu mah ahi hi.
Tu-in gen penin a kinei thu in: Sihna panin Khrih kihingkik sak hi, cihna thu ahih manin, bang hangin note pawlkhat in, misite thokiklo ding hi, ci thei na hi uh hiam
Tua bangin misite a thokiklo hi leh Khrih zong a kithosak kiklo hi ding hi
Khrih a kithosak kiklo hi leh kote' thuhilhna a mawkna hi ding a, note' thu up zong a mawkna mah suak ding hi
Tua bek zong hilo lai-in, misite a kihingkik saklo ding hi leh Pasian in Khrih hingkik sak hi, ci-in teci pang ka hih manun, mite kiangah Pasian' thu a manlopi-in a gen ka suak ding uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh misite a kihingkik saklo ding hi leh Khrih zong kihingkik saklo ding hi
Khrih a kihingkik saklo hi leh note' upna a mawkna hi ding a, na mawhna sung mah uhah note a omlai na suak ding uh hi
Khrih thu a um, a sisa mite zong a mawkna mah hi lai ding hi
Khrih hangin i lamet thu pen hih i leitung nuntak sung thu ding bek hi takpi leh leitung midang khempeuhte sangin a hehpihhuai zaw ihi ding hi
Ahi zongin a thuman taktak ci lehang, a sisa mite zong hingkik takpi ding hi cih a kitel theihna dingin sihna panin Khrih kihingkik sak khinzo hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh mi khat hangin sihna a ommah bangin mi khat hang mahin misite zong hin'kikna om hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Adam tawh a kizop manin mi khempeuh si a, tua mah bangin Khrih tawh a kizom khempeuh zong kihingsak kik ding hi
Ahi zongin tua hin'kikna pen ama hun tawh kizui-in a banbanin hi ding hi. A masa penin Khrih hi a, Khrih hong paikik ciangin ama pawlte khempeuh hingkik ding hi
Tua ciangin Khrih in ukna, vangliatna, aana a nei ama galte khempeuh a zawhgawp khit ciangin Pa Pasian tungah ukna aana ap ding a, tua ciangin hih leitung hun beina hong tung ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in a galte khempeuh zo-in a khenuai-ah a koihkhit hundong mateng Khrih in uk ding hi
A tawpna-ah suksiat ding a gal nunung pen in sihna ahi hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho in, “Pasian in na khempeuh ama khenuai-ah koih hi,” na ci hi. “Na khempeuh,” a cih ciangin Khrih' khutnuai-ah na khempeuh a koih Pasian mahmah simloh a vekpi-in a huamkhin ahihna kitel hi

Khrih' khutnuai-ah na khempeuh a kikoih ciangin ama khutnuai-ah na khempeuh a koihsak Pasian' khutnuai-ah Tapa mahmah zong om ding a, Pasian pen na khempeuh leh a kuamah peuh tungah a lianpen hi ding hi
Tua ciangin thu khatah, a sisa mite' tangdingin tui a kiphum mite in bang a deihna uh ahi hiam? Misite kihingkik sak hetlo ding ahih leh bang hangin a sisate' tangdingin tui kiphum ahi uh hiam
A site hin'kikna omlo ding hi leh bang hangin kote in nisimin gimna leh sihna zah dong dingin lauhuaina thuakin na sem nuam ding ka hi uh hiam
Sanggamte aw, i Topa Jesuh Khrih thu-ah note hangin ka kisaktheih zah mah bangin nisim mahin sihna a thuakthuak ka hi hi

Hih leitunga phattuamna ding bekin ngaihsun ni ci lehang, sahang tawh kilai bang keekin Efesa khuamite tawh ka kihihna uhah gim thaman bang ngah ka ahi hiam? Misite hin'kikna omlo ding hi leh, “Zing ciangin si khading ihih manin i duhduhin an ne zu ne-in nuamtakin om ni,” ci-in paunak a om bangin gamtat lel ding ahi hi
Sanggamte aw, mi' khemsa-in ta kei un. Kikholhpih hoihlote in mi siasak thei hi
Hoihtakin thu ngaihsun phakik un la, mawhna gamta nawn kei un. Note pawlkhat in Pasian thei hetlo na hih manun maizumhuai mahmah hi.
Mi pawlkhatte in, “A sisa mite bangci thawhkik ding a, bang pumpi tawh thokik ding ahi hiam?” cikha thei hi
Tua bang ngaihsutna haihuai mahmah hi. Khaici na tuh uh ciangin a muatlopi-in hong po theilo hi
Mangbuhci ahi a, khaici dang khat peuhpeuh ahi zongin na tuh uh ciangin hong po-in a khan'khit ciangin a kung omzia dingteng tawh a tuh na hi kei uh a, a khaici bek a tuh na hi uh hi
Ahi zongin Pasian in ama hoihsak bangin a kung ding na pia a, khaici nam tuamtuamte-a' ding kung nam tuamtuam a guan' hi
Tua mah bangin sa a nei nuntakna nam khempeuh zong a sa kibang kimlo hi. Mihing sa, ganhing sa, vasa sa, ngasa sa, cih bangin a nam tuamtuam a om hi
Vantung pumpi om a, leitung pumpi zong om hi. Vantung pumpi a hoihna a tuam khat hi a, leitung pumpi a hoihna zong a tuam khat mah ahi hi
Ni a hoihna a tuam khat hi a, kha a hoihna a tuam khat hi a, aksite a hoihna a tuam khat mah ahi hi. Aksite nangawn a hoihna a tuamtuamin omlai hi
Misite a thawhkikna zong hihte mah tawh kibang hi. A kiphum pen a muat thei hi a, a thokik pen a muat theilo ahi hi
A kiphum laitakin hatloin melsia a, a kithawhsak kik ciangin thahatin a melhoih hi
A kiphum laitakin leitung pumpi hi a, a kithawhsak kik ciangin kha pumpi ahi hi. Leitung pumpi a om mah bangin kha pumpi zong a omding ahi hi
Tua ahih manin Lai Siangtho in, “A masa Adam pen leitung nuntakna a nei mihing hong suak hi,” na ci hi. Ahi zongin a nunung Adam pen nuntakna a pia thei Kha ahi hi
Ahi zongin kha pumpi a om masa hiloin leitung pumpi a om masa hi a, leitung pumpi a omkhit ciangin kha pumpi a omthei pan ahi hi
A masa Adam pen leitung leivui tawh a kibawl hi a, a nunung Adam pen vantung panin a hong pai ahi hi
Leitung tawh a kipawl mite pen lei tawh a kibawl mite tawh a kibang hi a, vantung tawh a kipawl mite pen vantung panin a hong pai mipa tawh a kibang ahi hi
Eite in lei tawh a kibawl mite' lim i puak mah bangin vantung panin a hong pai Mipa' lim zong a pua ding ihi hi
Sanggamte aw, note kiangah ka hong gennop thu in: Pasian' Ukna sungah hih leitung silesa pumpi lut theilo ding a, a siathei pumpi pen a siatheilo pumpi suak theilo ding hi
Kuamah kim in a theihloh thusim khat na ngai un. Eite khempeuh a si khin ding ihi kei a, thakhatthu-in a kikheelvat ding ihi hi

Peengkul nunung hong gin' ciangin mitphiat kikal sungin i kikheelpak ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh peengkul hong gin' ciangin misite a sithei nawnlo dingin hong tho ding a, i vekpi-in i kikheel ding hi
A muatthei pumpi pen a muattheilo pumpi-in hong kikheel ding a, a sithei pumpi pen a sitheilo pumpi-in hong kikheel ding hi
A muatthei pen a muattheilo hong suakin, a sithei pen a sitheilo hong suah ciangin Lai Siangtho thu hong tung taktak ding hi. Lai Siangtho in, “Sihna maimangin gualzawhna in khuplet hi
Sihna aw, na gualzawhna koi-ah om a, midangte na suksiat zawhna ding na thahatna koi-ah omta ahi hiam?” na ci hi
Sihna a pian'na mawhna hang hi a, mawhna a kitheihna Thukham hang ahi hi
Ahi zongin i Topa Jesuh Khrih hangin gualzawhna a hong pia Pasian tungah i lung a dam hi

Tua ahih ciangin ka hong it sanggamte aw, Topa' hangin na nasepnate uh a mawkna hi ngei hetlo hi, ci-in na theih uh mah bangin Topa-a' dingin a tawntungin na sem un la, ling hetloin lungsim kiptakin na om ta un.
